Argument Name
name: awake-query-activities

outputs.description: UUID that uniquely identifies the activity AwakeSecurity.Activities.sessionId UUID that uniquely identifies the corresponding session
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.activityId

outputs.description: IP address of the source AwakeSecurity.Activities.sourceHost Hostname of the source
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.sourceIP

outputs.description: Port of the source AwakeSecurity.Activities.destinationIP IP address of the destination
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.sourcePort

outputs.description: Hostname of the destination AwakeSecurity.Activities.destinationPort Port of the destination
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.destinationHost

outputs.description: bool Do we know for sure which endpoint was the client? AwakeSecurity.Activities.activityDeviceName
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.directionKnown

outputs.description: Device name for the endpoint within your network AwakeSecurity.Activities.activityStart Date when the activity began
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: Date when the activity ended AwakeSecurity.Activities.protocols
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Activities.activityEnd
